#3 JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT==REPORTER CARL SAUCEDA-- CC FOR SETT CONF. ALL PRESENT. SETTLED AS FOLLOWS; STIP JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFS FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 2630 SUTTER ST #4, SF, CA. WRIT OF POSS TO ISSUE IMMED WITH S/E UNTIL JULY 13, L993. ALL RENTS ARE WAIVED BY PLTF BUT PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE IS TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. ALL PRESENT AGREE TO THIS SETTLEMENT IN OPEN COURT. PLTF ALSO ORALLY AMENDS COMPLAINT TO NAME AS DOE ONE DWAYNE TOMMELL MAYBERRY. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE BOTH DEFS IN THIS SETT.
